ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the demographic data belongs to */,
  "muslim_albanians" INTEGER /* Number of Muslim Albanians */,
  "orthodox_albanian_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of Orthodox Albanian speakers */,
  "total_albanian_speakers" INTEGER /* Total number of Albanian speakers */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group categorization */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender categorization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within Epirus */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Migration status categorization */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level categorization */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status categorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Greek census, Albanian government) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Government, Academic, Historical Record) */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the source (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
